dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The fluorescent lights hummed, a constant, dull drone. Another Tuesday. Another stack of invoices. Another day in the life of Kim Hyung-soo, Section Chief.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. Park
dialogue.line: Seriously, Section Chief Kim, you should try my method. Just 'delegate' the tedious stuff. That's what a manager does, right? Power of connections!

dialogue.speaker: Kim Hyung-soo
dialogue.line: (Thought) Connections. He talks of them like they’re a shield. He has no idea what a true connection demands.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. Park
dialogue.line: Anyway, I'm off to meet a client. Big fish. You just… keep at it, Section Chief.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Mr. Park sauntered out, his laughter echoing down the hall. Kim Hyung-soo didn't even look up. His phone vibrated.

dialogue.speaker: Minji (text)
dialogue.line: Dad, I'm staying late for a study group. Walking home with Hyejin after. Don't worry!

dialogue.speaker: Kim Hyung-soo
dialogue.line: (Thought) Don't worry. A child's words. Easy to say when you haven't seen the world. Every shadow holds a threat.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLICK. CLACK. (Keyboard sounds)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Hours later, the city lights blurred past his car window. The mundane office life faded, replaced by the familiar tension he carried in his bones.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: RING! RING! (Phone)

dialogue.speaker: Kim Hyung-soo
dialogue.line: Hello?

dialogue.speaker: Hyejin (frantic)
dialogue.line: Mr. Kim! It's Hyejin! Minji… she… some guys! At the old park! They won't let us go!

dialogue.speaker: Kim Hyung-soo
dialogue.line: (Calmly) Location. Now.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: His grip tightened on the steering wheel. The quiet manager was gone. The predator was awake.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: TIRES SCREECH. (Car turns sharply)

dialogue.speaker: Thug 1
dialogue.line: What's the rush, pretty? Just wanna talk. Maybe you can 'study' with us instead.

dialogue.speaker: Minji
dialogue.line: Leave us alone! My dad will be here!

dialogue.speaker: Thug 2
dialogue.line: Oh, 'Dad'? Is he gonna bring his walking stick?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A figure emerged from the shadows. Tall, unassuming. Kim Hyung-soo.

dialogue.speaker: Thug 3
dialogue.line: Look, it's grandpa. Go home, old man, before you get hurt.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Hyung-soo
dialogue.line: You have exactly three seconds to walk away.

dialogue.speaker: Thug 1
dialogue.line: Three seconds? What's he gonna do, lecture us?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THWACK! (Impact)

dialogue.speaker: Thug 1
dialogue.line: GAH!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Before the first thug could finish his sentence, Kim's hand had shot out, striking a nerve cluster in his neck. The thug crumpled, unconscious.

dialogue.speaker: Thug 2
dialogue.line: What the—?!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRACK! (Bone impact)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A swift, precise kick to the knee. Thug 2 screamed, collapsing. Kim pivoted, his eyes cold, locking onto Thug 3.

dialogue.speaker: Thug 3
dialogue.line: Y-you… you crazy old man!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHUMP! (Body hitting ground)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A short, brutal jab to the solar plexus. Thug 3 gasped for air, his eyes rolling back as he fell.

dialogue.speaker: Minji
dialogue.line: Dad…

dialogue.speaker: Kim Hyung-soo
dialogue.line: Are you hurt, Minji?

dialogue.speaker: Minji
dialogue.line: N-no… I’m okay.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Hyung-soo
dialogue.line: (Thought) The world is a dangerous place. And I am its most dangerous guardian, for her.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He turned back to his daughter, his expression softening, but the dangerous glint in his eyes remained, a silent promise to any who would threaten what was his.

summary: Kim Hyung-soo endures a mundane day at his office job, but his quiet manager facade shatters when his daughter, Minji, calls him in distress after being harassed by thugs, forcing him to unleash his brutal, precise combat skills.
